# PERF-73 positive: relation field accessed without Preload or Joins
lang: go
file: PERF-073-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Orders []Order
}

type Order struct {
	gorm.Model
	UserID uint
}

func UserOrders(db *gorm.DB) {
	var u User
	db.First(&u, 1)
	_ = u.Orders
}
